seo.title: Setu POS — Restaurant POS System for India & Global Operators | Billing, KOT & Multi-Outlet
seo.description: Setu POS is a cloud-based restaurant POS system built for restaurants in India and globally — tax-compliant billing, kitchen order tracking, table management and multi-outlet dashboards. Book a free demo.

hero.headline: Restaurant Management Software for India & Global Operators
hero.subheadline: Restaurant management, done right: billing, kitchen workflow, table management, multi-outlet dashboards, customer management, coupons and a built-in tax engine — everything a restaurant needs to run smoothly, from a single outlet to a full chain, in India and worldwide.

showcase.headline: One system, every part of your restaurant
showcase.subtext: Scroll through what's actually running under the hood — built around how a real shift moves, from the table to the till.

features.heading: Multi-outlet support
features.body: Run one outlet or twenty from the same system, with performance visible across every location.

features.heading: Role management
features.body: Give owners, managers and staff exactly the access they need — nothing more, nothing less.

features.heading: Kitchen workflow
features.body: Orders route straight to the right kitchen station, cutting mistakes and ticket time during rush hour.

features.heading: Table management
features.body: Track table status in real time — open, occupied, billed — so your floor staff always know what's happening.

features.heading: Customer management
features.body: Build a customer base automatically as people order, without a separate CRM tool.

features.heading: Coupons
features.body: Run promotions and loyalty offers without juggling a separate tool.

features.heading: Tax engine
features.body: Compliant billing out of the box, built for how tax actually works for restaurants globally.

features.heading: Fee engine
features.body: Service charges, packaging fees and platform fees, all configured once and applied automatically.

features.heading: Dashboard
features.body: See sales, orders and performance across every outlet from one screen — no more chasing spreadsheets.

features.heading: Billing
features.body: Fast, accurate billing at the counter or the table, with every line item accounted for.

features.heading: Payment
features.body: Accept cash, cards and local payment methods, reconciled automatically against every bill.

features.heading: QR customer tracking
features.body: Customers scan a QR code at the table to track their order status live and call a waiter for help, no app or login needed.

items.question: Is Setu POS suitable for restaurants in India?
items.answer: Yes. Setu POS is built with a tax engine designed around how billing actually works for restaurants in India, alongside support for restaurants running globally.

items.question: Does Setu POS support multiple outlets?
items.answer: Yes. You can run one outlet or twenty from the same system, with sales and performance visible across every location from a single dashboard.

items.question: What is KOT and how does Setu POS handle it?
items.answer: KOT (Kitchen Order Ticket) is how an order reaches the kitchen. Setu POS routes orders straight to the right kitchen station automatically, cutting mistakes and ticket time during rush hour.

items.question: Is Setu POS tax compliant?
items.answer: Yes. Compliant billing is built in out of the box, configured for how tax actually works for restaurants in India and other markets.

items.question: Can customers track their order without an app?
items.answer: Yes. Customers scan a QR code at the table to track their order status live and call a waiter for help — no app or login required.

items.question: What payment methods does Setu POS support?
items.answer: Setu POS accepts cash, cards and local payment methods including UPI, with every payment reconciled automatically against the bill.

items.question: Can I run promotions and coupons in Setu POS?
items.answer: Yes. Setu POS includes built-in coupons and loyalty offers, so you can run promotions without a separate tool.

items.question: How do I get started with Setu POS?
items.answer: Book a free 30-minute demo and we'll walk you through billing, kitchen workflow and multi-outlet reporting for your restaurant.

items.question: How is Setu POS different from other restaurant POS systems?
items.answer: Setu POS is built from the ground up for how restaurants actually operate in India and globally — local tax rules, local payment methods and multi-outlet operations are defaults, not add-ons. Every feature exists because a real restaurant owner needed it, not because it was on a feature checklist.

cta.headline: See Setu POS running in your restaurant
cta.subtext: Book a free 30-minute demo and we'll walk you through billing, kitchen workflow and multi-outlet reporting.
